spec.name: The Southern Commoner's Seats
spec.description: This is the southeastern part of the common seating areas. The benches here are made of stone and are probably centuries old. A few scratches on one of the benches catch your eye. An acrid smell is coming from the east and a tunnel leads off to the north.

north.description: The tunnel looks like it leads to another seating area.

east.description: There is an acrid smell coming from that direction.

extra_descs.description: They look like they form the words "Onivel Cinemod Semaj" But you could be mistaken.
